response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive full-stack development experience with a strong focus on TypeScript, Node.js, and modern frontend frameworks like React. His background in AI-agent infrastructure, enterprise tooling, and open-source contributions aligns well with the role's requirements. His diverse technical expertise and leadership in developer tooling make him a strong candidate for this senior position.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience (6+ years) with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and modern backend frameworks like Nest.js
Proven track record in AI-agent development and internal tooling, directly relevant to the role's focus on automation and enterprise engineering
Strong open-source contributions and leadership in developer tooling, demonstrating deep technical expertise and collaboration skills
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js experience, which is a primary stack requirement for the role
Some backend experience is in DLang/Java, which may require ramp-up time for Kotlin/Java services
Geographic location (Nigeria) may present logistical challenges for a Berlin-based role, though remote work is not explicitly excluded
